name: Mom's Old Fashioned Chocolate Mousse
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons instant espresso dissolved in 1 teaspoon or two of boiling water (to make a paste and then cool)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the egg yolks one at a time, stirring carefully to avoid scrambling.
3. Incorporate the coffee paste and allow it to cool to room temperature.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cooled chocolate mixture.
6. Refrigerate in a large bowl or individual wine glasses.
7. Serve garnished with slivered toasted almonds and whipped cream piped through a pastry bag.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
